历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 31838 → 34723 → 34871 → 41720 → 53307, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 18400 positions in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 53307; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 92, 88, 90, 88, and 89 respectively, basically stable in the 88–92 range; the 2026 plan increases to 99, an expansion of about 11.2% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, easing competition but rankings still affected by other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 113th in the main ranking of Soft Science (2026), fluctuating between 104–113 in recent years, belonging to the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities; Douyin popularity ranking 50th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 657,000, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and slightly increased application attention; maritime management, marine engineering, and other navigation-specific majors have industry barriers.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be socially popular, matching the main enrollment majors of this university; the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base; the university is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, far from Guangdong Province, and the regional preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Guangdong candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 53307, the 2026 expansion of about 11.2% (pushing the ranking number higher), the increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees by about 3.6% (pushing the ranking number higher), and the relatively hot Douyin popularity (slightly pushing the ranking number lower), the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 57100, with a range of 56600–57600.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 7722 → 9194 → 10039 → 8754 → 9795. It rebounded to 8754 in 2024 but shifted back to 9795 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 600 places over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 9795. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category remained stable at 22 students from 2021 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 21 students, a decrease of about 4.5% compared to 2025. Although the reduction is small, it signals intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 113th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 50th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity score of about 657,000, indicating moderate-to-high application attention. The History Category majors are primarily in economics, management, literature, and law, which have low correlation with the university's strong engineering disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geographic Location
专业热度与地域.text: Law has divided social popularity but clear advantages for civil service exams; Economics is relatively popular; Business Administration is divided and watched. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, far from Guangdong, and the geographic preference for cross-province study may somewhat suppress the willingness of Guangdong candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9795, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 4.5% (pushing the ranking number lower), the significant increase of about 11.6% in Guangdong History Category examinees (pushing the ranking number higher), and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category is approximately 9600, with a range of 9100 to 10100.
